reviews.review_msg: The class itself was only okay. Like other reviewers, the best part of the class was the videos, but lectures were tough to sit through because he didn't engage the class well. Midterm exam was only 50 minutes but definitely could have used more time and refuses to accept feedback. I won't be taking another class of this professor again.

I had Dr. Cooper for IS230 and loved her in that class, so I decided to take IS355 with her as well. Despite the course work being a bit more difficult to make up for the fact it's an upper division course, I cannot say enough great things about Dr. Cooper. Definitely one of the best IS profs and I highly recommend her.
